details.subject: anthropic-logo-light.svg
details.notes: Known dual-use (top banner + Phase 1 brand lockup); benign per prior review R-004.

details.subject: #phase-label
details.notes: Chrome ticker re-applies opacity to same selector each phase. False positive per prior review R-003. overwrite: 'auto' already set on initial fromTo.

details.subject: index.html (1040 lines)
details.notes: Same as 8-scene review R-002. Structural refactor; out of scope for re-review.

validate_wcag_contrast.delta_explanation: Scene 5 adds 4 killer-badge + 4 killer-skull elements (8 new decorative contrast hits) but only 7 net because token-stream sampling timestamps consolidate. All hero/body text passes. No new failures on hero/headline text introduced by Scene 5.

font_family_render_blocker.notes: No --font-* CSS variable references that would render-block. All font-family declarations are literal strings.

composition_duration_vs_narration.notes: tl.set({}, {}, 143.22) at line 1661 pins the timeline correctly per hyperframes-pitfalls.md section 1.

medium.title: 31 decorative WCAG contrast warnings (up from 24 in 8-scene)
medium.detail: All decorative (token-stream ambient filler, badge tokens, surface icons, code-num ordinals, killer-badges, killer-skulls). No body or hero text fails. Not a publish blocker.
